DiskExpansionAndTypeChange.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters; see [ClientToken Idempotency](BCC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
DiskExpansionAndTypeChange.newCdsSizeInGB: New CDS disk capacity after expansion; must be an integer greater than the current CDS capacity, in GB, valid range: 1–32765 GB.
DiskExpansionAndTypeChange.newExtraIO: Adjusted additional IOPS count; supports upgrade and downgrade. newVolumeType, newCdsSizeInGB, and newExtraIO cannot all be empty simultaneously.
DiskExpansionAndTypeChange.newVolumeType: CDS supports upgrade and downgrade for both prepaid and postpaid cloud disks. newVolumeType and newCdsSizeInGB cannot both be empty simultaneously.
DiskExpansionAndTypeChange.newVolumeType.sata: Previous-generation cloud disk, dedicated for DCC sub-instance creation
DiskExpansionAndTypeChange.newVolumeType.local_ssd: Data stored on local SSD; low latency, good IO and throughput; suited for medium-to-large relational database workloads
DiskExpansionAndTypeChange.newVolumeType.local_hdd 或 std1: Local HDD disk; suited for large-scale data storage scenarios
DiskExpansionAndTypeChange.newVolumeType.local_nvme 或 nvme: Local NVMe disk; data stored on local NVMe SSD; ultra-high performance; suited for latency-sensitive workloads
